The logo cuts to a man with short blond hair in a black shirt and striped apron with yellow text, pouring dark liquid from a white cup into a blender. The view splits, showing a blurred pouring shot on the left and the man in a light blue shirt leaning forward with an open mouth on the right.

The scene cuts to a blurry view of a person in a blue shirt vigorously shaking a metal cocktail shaker.

A blond man in a blue shirt and dark apron holds a clear plastic bottle with yellow fruit chunks horizontally. The screen splits to show him laughing on the left, while on the right, he points at a white bowl of chopped pale food on a counter beside a wine glass.

The video cuts to a blurred kitchen background where thin white text reading "MAD" appears on the left. The word "TIPS" appears on the right side in the same font. Red and orange confetti-like particles begin to scatter and float downwards across the screen over the out-of-focus environment.

The central gap between "MAD" and "TIPS" fills with "GENIUS" in a blocky, orange-red font. Below the main title, "WITH JUSTIN CHAPPLE" appears in small white letters. Subsequently, the text "How to Peel Tomatoes Easily" fades in at the bottom center, overlaying the blurred kitchen environment.
